name: The Muppets Kitchen with Cat Cora
original_name: The Muppets Kitchen with Cat Cora
overview: This web series features Cat Cora making some dishes with her Muppet sidekick Angelo — an Italian chef who was taught all about cooking by The Swedish Chef. Pepe the King Prawn was also in the show where he would always close out the show.

trailers.title: Muppet's Kitchen with Cat Cora Disney sneak peek
